title: Automate movement of items from one group to another on a schedule
excerpt: We currently move proposals won to a group called Recently Won.  I’d like to have an automation that runs weekly that moves all items in Recently Won to another group called Won.   The automation beginning with Every Tim…

posts.author: BruceB (Bruce Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
We currently move proposals won to a group called Recently Won. I’d like to have an automation that runs weekly that moves all items in Recently Won to another group called Won. The automation beginning with Every Time Period is limited in actions. Is there a simple way to do this that I am overlooking?
Thanks!
Bruce

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @BruceB

That looks like a perfect fir for the app Date Controlled Groups (see https://monday.com/marketplace/111 and 50|Date Controlled Groups - Excellent Team) where you can define the rules (date based) to move an item to a group and a schedule (in your case once a week) the movement should take place.
